response.justification: Bogdan has relevant experience in software development, experimentation, and technical leadership. He has worked on various projects that involve complex systems and has demonstrated his ability to design and implement scalable solutions.
strengths: Proven experience in designing and implementing complex software systems
Strong technical leadership skills with experience in mentoring engineers
Experience with multiple programming languages and technologies
concerns: Career gap in 2025 due to caregiving
Limited direct experience in AI-first growth and experimentation systems
No direct mention of experience with specific technologies like C, C++, or Java
